title: Daily Training
tickModelDone: Today's training has already run. Changes to focus or intensity now take effect at the next training (tomorrow). Form and fatigue update only at the daily training, not continuously.
disabledNote: Daily training is currently paused. Training programs can still be set up now.
recoveryNoteTitle: Do riders get energy back every day?
recoveryNote: Yes. Every night around midnight each rider recovers some fatigue, so it never gets stuck at 100. Rest and easy days recover the most; normal training settles at a sustainable level; hard training still builds fatigue up over the day. A high Recovery rating speeds it up.
focusGuideIntro: Each focus develops these abilities faster. Your other abilities keep improving a little more slowly, so riders develop across the board, just fastest in the chosen direction.
focusGuideIntensity: Intensity sets the pace: Easy is safe, Normal is the balanced default (small setback risk), Hard is fastest (clear risk of a setback or injury when fatigue is high).
focusGuideGating: Every rider has a type and a hidden potential per ability. A focus only develops abilities that suit the rider's type: abilities the type is naturally weak in will barely move (or not at all), no matter the intensity. Check the type badge before picking a focus.
trainabilityChipLimitedTitle: This rider's type has little natural aptitude for this focus. Rider type and hidden potential set a ceiling per ability, so growth here will be slow.
trainabilityChipBlockedTitle: This rider's type can't develop these abilities through training. Rider type and hidden potential set a ceiling per ability, and for an opposite-type focus that ceiling is the current level.
trainabilityChipLimited: Limited upside for this rider type
trainabilityChipBlocked: This rider type won't develop these abilities
noRiders: No riders on your squad yet.
bulkPartial: Updated {applied} of {total}. {failed} could not be saved. Try again in a moment.
bulkSmartSkippedHasPlan: {n, plural, one {Skipped # rider with an existing plan.} other {Skipped # riders with an existing plan.}}
historySubtitle: Your last 30 days of daily training
historyEmpty: No training runs yet. Once daily training is live, each day's run will be logged here.
riderHistorySubtitle: This rider's daily training over the last 30 days
riderHistoryEmpty: No training history for this rider yet.
weekRhythmIntro: Set your team's target intensity for each day of the week. This is only the default for riders without their own setting: a rider's own focus and intensity, or their individual weekly plan, always take priority over the team rhythm for that rider. "Train today" still needs your click for the consistency bonus.
weekRhythmReset: Weekly rhythm removed: riders are back to their season intensity every day.
weekRhythmSaveFailed: Could not save. Try again in a moment.
planActionErrorGeneric: Could not save. Try again in a moment.
planActionError_not_own_rider: You can only train your own riders.
planActionError_auth: Your session expired. Sign in again.
planActionError_network: Connection failed. Check your network and try again.
weekRhythmBonusNote: The rhythm is a default: it only applies to riders without their own focus/intensity or individual weekly plan, and it never touches focus. The manager consistency bonus (+25%) still only applies when you click "Train today" yourself.
weekRhythmTodayHintPlan: today: {intensity} (this rider's own setting, overrides team rhythm)
focusCappedTitle: This rider has reached their lifetime ceiling in every ability this focus trains. Training this focus gains nothing more. Switch focus, or use the rider as they are.
individualWeekPlanIntro: Set {name}'s own target intensity for each day of the week. This overrides the team's weekly rhythm for this rider only; focus is never touched here.
individualWeekPlanRemoved: Individual weekly plan removed: rider follows the team rhythm again.
individualWeekPlanBadgeTitle: This rider has their own individual weekly plan, which overrides the team's weekly rhythm.
momentBreakthrough_1: {riderName} finds another gear in {ability}, up to {to} now.
momentBreakthrough_2: A real step forward for {riderName} today, {ability} climbs to {to}.
momentNearBreakthrough_0: {riderName} is closing in on a breakthrough in {ability}, {pct}% of the way there.
momentNearBreakthrough_1: One more good session and {riderName} bumps {ability} up a level, already {pct}% there.
momentNearBreakthrough_2: {riderName}'s {ability} is on the edge of the next step, {pct}% through the block.
momentNearBreakthrough_3: Watch {riderName}: {ability} is nearly ready to tick over, {pct}% logged.
momentPeakForm_0: {riderName} is riding sharp form right now, primed for the next big day.
momentPeakForm_1: {riderName} is in peak form today, timing looks good for what's coming.
momentPeakForm_2: Form is reading strong for {riderName}, this is the shape to race in.
momentPeakForm_3: {riderName} is flying in training right now, form near its best.
momentSharpDay_0: {riderName} had a sharp day on the bike, above expectation.
momentSharpDay_1: A strong session for {riderName} today, output beat the plan.
momentSharpDay_2: {riderName} answered the day's training well, a sharp one.
momentSharpDay_3: Good numbers from {riderName} today, a clearly sharp session.
momentQuiet_0: Quiet day on the training log: {trained} riders out, base miles banked, no headline gains yet.
momentQuiet_1: Nothing dramatic today, {trained} riders trained and the work goes into the log.
momentQuiet_2: A steady block for the squad: {trained} on the bike, gains building quietly underneath.
momentQuiet_3: No standout story today, just {trained} riders putting in the miles.
momentRest_0: Recovery day across the roster: no sessions logged, legs get the rest instead.
momentRest_1: Full rest for the squad today, tomorrow's training starts from fresher legs.
momentRest_2: Quiet at the training base today: everyone's on a rest day.
momentRest_3: The whole roster took it easy today, recovery over output.
